data.body: 6fe2 CI FIX: patchset 1 got LLM-Review +1 (code review PASSED) but Verified -1 from the module-size CI gate: _processors.py 793->813 crossed the 800 soft cap. Fix (belongs in 6fe2 since it grew the file): added _processors.py to .github/module-size-allowlist.txt + a ceiling row (855, pinned to the creation-channel epic stack's landing size per the gate_dispatch/runner in-flight-stack precedent) + a docs/architecture.md remedy row (planned seam: extract keyring processor cluster once >100 LOC). module-size contract test passes locally (5/5). Amended (eac210b, same Change-Id I5c2b5610) + re-pushed as patchset 2. Both gates re-running.
